title: T-106 — PARITY: FA planning/commercial tabs — browser screenshot parity vs prototype
prompt:
# T-106 — PARITY: FA planning/commercial tabs browser parity (slice of T-025)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §5.4-§5.9
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:537-868 (Planning 537-557, Commercial 559-586, MRP 763-804, Procurement 806-838)
Parent root: T-025

## Goal
Run Playwright browser-level parity for all 4 wired tabs (MRP, Procurement, Commercial, Planning) against the prototype. Capture screenshots, compare structural / visual / interaction / data parity against the prototype JSX, and run axe accessibility checks (0 violations).

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:537-868`
- Planning tab: lines 537-557
- Commercial tab: lines 559-586
- MRP tab: lines 763-804
- Procurement tab: lines 806-838
- Tabs nav: lines 314-315 (planning, commercial, mrp, procurement)

## Implementation contract
New Playwright e2e test file `apps/web/e2e/npd/fa-planning-commercial-tabs.spec.ts` that:
- Navigates to `/fa/[id]` with a seeded FA fixture
- For each of the 4 tabs: activates it, captures screenshot, runs axe (`@axe-core/playwright`), asserts no violations
- Compares screenshot vs prototype reference (visual parity)
- Asserts structural parity: field count + field labels + field order match prototype
- Asserts interaction parity: save buttons fire updateFaCell, gated fields locked correctly (V-NPD-PROC-001, V08, Core gate)
- Asserts data parity: rendered values match seeded fixture

## Files in scope
- `apps/web/e2e/npd/fa-planning-commercial-tabs.spec.ts [create]`
- `apps/web/e2e/fixtures/fa-planning-commercial.fixture.ts [create]`
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Playwright spec runs, when each of the 4 tabs (Planning, Commercial, MRP, Procurement) is activated, then a screenshot is captured and saved to `apps/web/e2e/__screenshots__/fa-planning-commercial-tabs/`.
2. Given a screenshot is captured, when compared against prototype reference range (537-557 / 559-586 / 763-804 / 806-838), then structural parity passes (field count + labels + order), visual parity passes (layout matches), and interaction parity passes (gates + save).
3. Given axe accessibility check runs on each tab, when results are inspected, then there are 0 violations across all 4 tabs.
4. Given seeded FA fixture has known values, when each tab renders, then data parity passes (rendered field values equal fixture values).
5. UI closeout attaches screenshot paths, Playwright trace/video paths, and axe report; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: Playwright spec fails before T-101..T-105 are complete (tabs do not yet exist on page).
- Run: `pnpm --filter web exec playwright test e2e/npd/fa-planning-commercial-tabs.spec.ts`.
- Attach Playwright trace.zip, video.webm, and axe JSON report in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify tab components or wiring (T-101..T-105 own them) — if parity fails, file a defect and reopen the relevant slice
- Do not skip axe checks
- Do not accept screenshot diff over noise threshold without manual review

pipeline_inputs.description: Playwright browser screenshot parity for 4 wired FA tabs (MRP, Procurement, Commercial, Planning) vs prototype 537-868. Includes axe (0 violations).
pipeline_inputs.details: One Playwright spec file. For each tab: activate, screenshot, axe, parity assertions (structural + visual + interaction + data). Does not modify tab components.

Given screenshots are captured, when compared against prototype reference (537-557 / 559-586 / 763-804 / 806-838), then structural + visual + interaction parity all pass.
Given axe runs on each tab, when results are inspected, then 0 violations across all 4 tabs.
Given seeded FA fixture, when each tab renders, then data parity passes (rendered values equal fixture values).

UI closeout attaches screenshots, Playwright trace/video, and axe report per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright unavailable, document blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
